title: Beyond Wildlife India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Beyond Wildlife India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India:
Beyond Wildlife India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
